# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  parameters:
    devIPs:
      type: array
      defaultValue: ['X.X.X.X', 'Y.Y.Y.Y']
    adminLogin:
      type: string
      defaultValue: 'sqladmin'
    adminPassword:
      type: securestring
      defaultValue: 'AzureSQL2024!'
  variables:
    sqlServerName: 'myStagingSQLServer'

  functions:
    function firewallRuleForAnyService:
      type: Microsoft.Azure.Resources.Utilities.Functions. Arm.Functions.FunctionResource
      apiVersion: 2018-08-01
      properties:
        typeHandlerVersion: '2.0'
        managedResourceBlockName: 'FirewallRuleForAnyService'
        managedResourceType: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewalls/rules
        resourceDependsOn: [Microsoft.Sql/servers/<serverName>]
        resources:
          - apiVersion: 2019-04-01
            properties:
              description: 'Allow Azure Services to connect'
              name: 'AzureServices'
              startFirewallRulePort: '0'
              endFirewallRulePort: '65535'
              sourceIpAddressPrefix: 'AzureServices'
              resourceGroup: '<resourceGroup>'
              serverName: '<serverName>'
            type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewalls/rules

  resources:
    resources:
      - name: '<resourceGroup>'
        type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups
        apiVersion: 2018-05-01
        properties:
          location: 'eastus'

      - name: '<serverName>'
        type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
        apiVersion: 2019-04-01
        properties:
          adminLogin: '[parameters('adminLogin')]'
          adminPassword: '[parameters('adminPassword')]'
          location: 'eastus'
          resources:
            - name: firewallRules
              type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewalls/rules
              apiVersion: 2019-04-01
              properties:
                description: 'Allow our development IPs'
                name: 'DevIPs'
                sourceIpAddressPrefix: '[parameters('devIPs')]'
                resourceGroup: '<resourceGroup>'
                serverName: '<serverName>'
                firewallRuleAction: 'Allow'

      - name: FirewallRuleForAnyServiceFunction:[functions('Microsoft.Azure.Resources.Utilities.Functions. Arm.Functions').<functionName>]
        type: Microsoft.Resources/functions
        apiVersion: 2018-05-01
        properties:
          location: 'eastus'

      - apiVersion: 2018-05-01
        name: DependsOn_FirewallRuleForAnyServiceFunction
        type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments
        properties:
          templateLink:
            uri: '<templateLink>'
            contentVersion: ''
          parameters:
            functionName: FirewallRuleForAnyServiceFunction
          resources: []

variables:
  functionName: 'FirewallRuleForAnyService'
